testcase.name: setup

failure.message: Expected `study.current.variables$objects.found` to have the same values as `expected.variables`. ('test-smk-checkClass-discordant.R:21:5')

testcase.failure: Expected `study.current.variables$objects.found` to have the same values as `expected.variables`. Actual: "D", "read_datashield_inst", "to_df" Expected: "D" Needs: "read_datashield_inst", "to_df" Backtrace: x 1. \-global ds_expect_variables(c("D")) at test-smk-checkClass-discordant.R:21:5 2. \-testthat::expect_setequal(...)

testcase.name: check_slope_formulae
